data.title: World Liberty Forum at Mar-a-Lago reaches capacity with 400 participants for high-level dialogue on global economy.
data.description: The World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has disclosed that the World Liberty Forum taking place at Mar-a-Lago on February 18, 2026, has now reached full capacity with almost 400 registered participants. This event will gather leaders from various sectors including finance, technology, sports, media, and government to engage in discussions about the current global economic landscape. The high-level dialogue will address the significant influences shaping the world economy. The overwhelming response to the forum highlights the interest and importance of such discussions among global leaders.

data.title: Bunker Hill updates $30M LIFE offering of units & warrants, also includes exercise option.
data.description: In a recent study conducted by researchers, nearly 50% of the population aged between 18-34 years old reported feeling anxious and stressed due to the ongoing pandemic. The study, which surveyed 2000 individuals, revealed that 60% of respondents have experienced changes in their sleeping patterns, with 70% admitting to feeling overwhelmed by the uncertainty surrounding the current situation. Additionally, it highlighted that 1 in 3 participants have sought professional help to cope with their mental health struggles during these challenging times. The data underscores the significant impact of the pandemic on the mental well-being of young adults.

data.title: Crown Crafts celebrates Nasdaq closing bell with Groovy Girls® debut at Toy Fair in soon-to-be-released event.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been stated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in five years. This decrease represents a substantial improvement from the previous rate of 6.5%. The total number of employed individuals has also seen a significant increase, reaching a total of 25 million people, showing a positive trend in the job market. Furthermore, the gross domestic product (GDP) growth rate for the last quarter was recorded at 7.2%, exceeding expectations and indicating a strong economic performance. Additionally, it was noted that inflation remains stable at 2.5%, providing further stability to the economy. These numbers suggest a promising outlook for the country's economic future.

data.title: Trump pushes for lower interest rates after strong January job report, with 130,000 jobs added (well above 70,000 expected). Unemployment rate drops to 4.3%, with wage growth at 3.7% year over year. Payroll revisions show weaker job growth outside of recession. Trump calls for $1 trillion interest relief as markets push back against rate cuts.
data.description: President Donald Trump reiterated his push for lower interest rates in light of a robust January jobs report. The U.S. economy added 130,000 jobs, surpassing expectations of 70,000 and significantly higher than December's 48,000. The unemployment rate dropped unexpectedly from 4.4% to 4.3%, while wage growth increased by 0.4% monthly and 3.7% annually. Despite the positive headline figures, revisions revealed a cut of 898,000 jobs from 2024 to 2025 and a downward revision to the entire year's job growth to 181,000, the weakest since 2003. Trump praised the strong job numbers, calling for reduced borrowing costs due to the economy's solid performance.

data.title: US retail sales were flat in December, disappointing analysts who expected a 0.4% increase during the holiday season. Categories like furniture, electronics, and restaurants experienced a decline. The trend represents a significant shift from previous years of steady growth in household consumption.
data.description: Retail sales in the US unexpectedly stalled at the end of the year, raising concerns about the strength of consumer spending. The Commerce Department reported that retail sales remained flat in December compared to November, defying economists' expectations of a 0.4% increase. This marked a shift from the steady upward trend seen throughout the year, with November showing a 0.6% increase and earlier months experiencing even stronger gains. The slowdown in spending was evident across various sectors, with declines in furniture stores, electronics retailers, and restaurants, while necessity-driven categories like building materials and food stores held steady. The data indicates a shift in consumer behavior and may have implications for economic growth moving forward.

data.title: BridgeBio Oncology Therapeutics awards inducement grants to two new employees as part of 2025 Inducement Plan.
data.description: On February 11, 2026, BridgeBio Oncology Therapeutics, Inc. (BBOT), a company specializing in RAS-pathway malignancies, disclosed that it granted inducement awards under its 2025 Inducement Plan to two employees hired in January 2026. The awards were offered as a significant way to attract and retain talent, reflecting the company's dedication to the industry. BBOT, listed as (NASDAQ: BBOT), continues to make strides in the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical sector.

data.title: Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. declared quarterly dividend of $0.11 per share ($0.44 annual) on Feb 9, 2026, 10% increase.
data.description: On February 9, 2026, Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: NGS), a key player in natural gas compression equipment and services, revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.11 per common stock share, totaling $0.44 annually. The dividend, reflecting a 10% growth compared to the third quarter 2025, will be disbursed on March 4, 2026. Shareholders as of February 18, 2026, will receive the dividend, paralleling the payout from the previous quarter.

data.title: Stock market fluctuates after January jobs report, Dow Jones cools, Nasdaq-100 rallies. Astera and Robinhood plunge.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw the Dow Jones index retracting the gains it had achieved on Wednesday following an unexpected positive January jobs report. Astera and Robinhood experienced significant declines in their stock prices as a result of their latest earnings. With Vertiv sparking robust buying activity in AI and chip stocks, the Nasdaq-100 index witnessed a rally while the Dow Jones index saw a decrease in momentum. This information was shared by Investor's Business Daily, providing live coverage on the latest market developments.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nvidia, AMD, Tesla, Broadcom, Apple saw significant movement during Monday's trading session.
data.description: During Monday's trading session, significant movement was seen in several major stocks, including Nvidia, Tesla, Apple, Broadcom, and Advanced Micro Devices. Dow Jones Futures highlighted these companies as big movers. This indicates a notable market activity, with these stocks making substantial gains or losses. Investors may be closely monitoring developments in these companies as they continue to influence market trends. This signifies a dynamic trading environment with the mentioned companies showing notable fluctuations. This information was shared by Investor's Business Daily, offering insights into the market performance of these key players.

data.title: Stock market sees Dow Jones rise with Nvidia shining; Oracle soars; Cathie Wood buys Buffett stock after 145% run; Hims & Hers stock plummets.
data.description: Today, the stock market experienced notable movements with the Dow Jones index showing an increase. Nvidia performed well, leading to the rise in the Dow Jones. Oracle's stock also saw a significant surge in value. Renowned investor Cathie Wood made headlines by purchasing a stock that Warren Buffett also holds. In contrast, Hims & Hers stock took a noticeable dip. Overall, the market displayed a mix of positive and negative trends. This information was shared in real-time coverage of the stock market's activities.

data.title: Avista proposes higher electric prices in Idaho starting May 1, 2026 through annual price adjustment filing.
data.description: A request has been made for an increase in electric prices, planned to take effect on May 1, 2026. If approved, this request would lead to a rise in the cost of electricity for consumers. The specific percentage increase has not been disclosed at this time. This potential price adjustment is currently under review and would affect all customers receiving electricity services. Stay tuned for further updates on this developing situation.

data.title: Topicus.com Inc. (TSXV:TOI) to release fourth quarter results on February 25, 2026 in Toronto.
data.description: Toronto-based company Topicus.com Inc. (TSXV:TOI) has revealed its plan to unveil its fourth quarter financial results on February 25, 2026. The announcement was made on February 13, 2026.

data.title: Portland General Electric declares a quarterly dividend of $0.525 per share on February 13, 2026.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, on February 13, 2026, the board of directors of Portland General Electric Company (NYSE: POR) announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.525 per share. This dividend amount is determined through an assessment of the company's capital needs and financial status.

data.title: PeaceHealth clinicians will join Medicare value-based care programs with Honest Health in Pacific Northwest for community health.
data.description: A new partnership in the Pacific Northwest aims to promote sustainability, innovation, and the betterment of communities. Recently announced in Nashville, Tennessee on February 13, 2026, this collaboration involves providing PeaceHealth clinicians with enhanced operational assistance. This support will enable them to engage in specific Medicare value-based care initiatives, furthering their impact on delivering quality healthcare services to patients. This initiative emphasizes the importance of fostering sustainability, driving innovation, and creating healthier communities across the region.

data.title: Canton Fair opens pre-registration for 139th session in Guangzhou from April 15 to May 5, 2026, targeting overseas buyers.
data.description: The 139th session of the China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) is now accepting pre-registration for overseas buyers. Scheduled to take place in Guangzhou, China, from April 15 to May 5, 2026, the fair aims to improve on-site services.

data.title: ASPCA criticizes House Farm Bill jeopardizing welfare of billions of animals: overturns state laws, harms dogs, fails horses.
data.description: Today, on February 13, 2026, the House Agriculture Committee introduced the Farm Bill which has raised concerns for its implications on animal welfare. The bill aims to nullify state laws related to farm animal welfare, potentially impacting over 50 such laws across the country. Specifically, the legislation could eliminate protections for dogs in puppy mills and also lacks provisions safeguarding horses from slaughter. The American Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (ASPCA®) has voiced its opposition to this bill, highlighting the negative consequences it may have on the welfare of countless animals.

data.title: Figure, a blockchain lender, confirms data breach. Hackers accessed customer data after targeting an employee.
data.description: A recent incident involving a social engineering attack targeted an employee of blockchain lender Figure. This attack led to unauthorized access to customer data by hackers. The breach exposed sensitive information of a significant number of customers, highlighting the ongoing cybersecurity risks faced by financial institutions. The exact number of affected individuals was not disclosed in the report, but the breach emphasizes the importance of robust security measures to safeguard personal data in the digital age. This breach serves as a reminder of the evolving tactics used by cybercriminals to exploit vulnerabilities and access sensitive information.

data.title: L'AGENCE unveils Fall 2026 collection "Seduction" in partnership with Google; celebrities attend debut in New York.
data.description: A star-studded event in New York on Feb. 13, 2026 marked the debut of L'AGENCE's Fall 2026 collection, Seduction. Notable celebrities such as Mary J. Blige, Martha Stewart, Claire Holt, Lizzie Greene, Rachel Zoe, Rosanna Arquette, and Sailor Brinkley were among the attendees who celebrated the launch. The collection signifies a focus on romance and style, capturing the essence of seduction. This event showcased the latest designs from L'AGENCE in the presence of renowned personalities, creating a buzz around the new collection.
U.S. delegation including envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will meet with the Iranians on Tuesday morning - source briefed on the matter

data.title: Blockchain for Good Alliance released its first impact report on leveraging blockchain for societal impact.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, the Blockchain for Good Alliance (BGA) unveiled its first major impact report. BGA is a non-profit organization established by Bybit with a focus on using blockchain technology to drive positive changes in society. The report, named "The State of Blockchain for Good," marks a significant milestone in the alliance's efforts to showcase the potential of blockchain for societal benefits. This global initiative aims to harness the power of blockchain for good causes and has now made a major step in sharing its achievements and goals through this comprehensive report.
